## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed my own changes
- [ ] The PR has a focused scope and contains no unrelated changes
- [ ] User-facing or developer documentation was updated where needed
- [ ] New behaviour has clear manual test coverage
- [ ] I have not committed secrets, generated build output, or local environment files
